Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class LegalEntity

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.LegalEntity
public class LegalEntity extends Object
LegalEntity - A legal entity. Legal entities are organizations, such as companies, that participate in financial transactions

    If the legal entity is a trust, the formation date is required.

    If the legal entity is a trust, they may set this field to convey ownership and value to a trustee.

    The Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) is the financial industry term for a unique global identifier for legal entities participating in financial transactions

      public LegalEntity()

  • Method Details

    • accreditedInvestor

      public Optional<Boolean> accreditedInvestor()
      Indicates whether the entity is an accredited investor. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • adviser

      public Optional<Boolean> adviser()
      Indicates whether the entity is an adviser. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • brokerDealer

      public Optional<Boolean> brokerDealer()
      Indicates whether the entity is a broker dealer. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • businessIndustrialClassification

      public Optional<LegalEntityBusinessIndustrialClassification> businessIndustrialClassification()

    • corporateStructure

      public Optional<LegalEntityCorporateStructure> corporateStructure()
      Corporate structure of the entity.

    • correspondentId

      public Optional<String> correspondentId()
      The correspondent id associated with the legal entity.

    • doingBusinessAs

      public Optional<List<String>> doingBusinessAs()
      DBA (Doing Business As) names. Can list up to 5 associated with the Legal Entity

    • entityDueDiligence

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<EntityDueDiligence> entityDueDiligence()
      Due Diligence for Legal Entities

    • entityName

      public Optional<String> entityName()
      The legal entity name.

    • entityType

      public Optional<LegalEntityEntityType> entityType()
      The entity type.

    • exemptCustomerReason

      public Optional<LegalEntityExemptCustomerReason> exemptCustomerReason()
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Exempt entities must set `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` to `true` and provide an `exempt_customer_reason` on the owner record.

      Required if `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` is `true`.

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • exemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners

      public Optional<Boolean> exemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners()
      Indicates whether the entity is exempt from verifying beneficial owners and Enhanced Due Diligence. By default, this is set to `false`

    • forTheBenefitOf

      public Optional<String> forTheBenefitOf()
      If the legal entity is a trust, they may set this field to convey ownership and value to a trustee.

    • foreignEntity

      public Optional<Boolean> foreignEntity()
      Indicates whether the entity is a foreign entity. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • foreignFinancialInstitution

      public Optional<Boolean> foreignFinancialInstitution()
      Indicates whether the entity is a foreign financial institution. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • formationDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<FormationDate> formationDate()
      If the legal entity is a trust, the formation date is required.

    • globalPersonId

      public Optional<String> globalPersonId()
      Globally Unique identifier for a legal natural person

    • institutionalCustomer

      public Optional<Boolean> institutionalCustomer()
      Indicates whether the entity is an institutional customer

    • investigationId

      public Optional<String> investigationId()
      Investigation id relating to the Customer Identification Program (CIP) and Customer Due Diligence (CDD).

    • largeTrader

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<LegalEntityLargeTrader> largeTrader()
      Large trader for the legal entity.

    • legalAddress

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<LegalAddress> legalAddress()
      The mailing address of the legal entity. Required fields within the `legal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • legalEntityId

      public Optional<String> legalEntityId()
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single juridical (non-natural) person (e.g., a corporation); Used to access the record after creation

    • leiCode

      public Optional<String> leiCode()
      The Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) is the financial industry term for a unique global identifier for legal entities participating in financial transactions

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The name field Format: legalEntities/{legalEntity}

    • operatingRegions

      public Optional<List<String>> operatingRegions()
      The operational footprint of an entity. Operating regions encompass all countries and regions where a company has a significant business presence This includes locations with physical offices, manufacturing plants, service centers, and sales and marketing activities Regions must be provided as two-character CLDR country codes

    • registrationRegion

      public Optional<String> registrationRegion()
      The legal home of an entity. A region of registration, in the context of a corporation, refers to the specific geographic area where the corporation is legally registered and incorporated Defines the legal jurisdiction and framework under which the corporation operates, including legal regulations, tax obligations, and compliance requirements Region must be provided as a two-character CLDR country code

    • regulatedInvestmentCompany

      public Optional<Boolean> regulatedInvestmentCompany()
      Indicates whether the entity is a regulated investment company. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • relatedDocumentIds

      public Optional<List<String>> relatedDocumentIds()
      Document ids related to the legal entity. At least one is required for RIA correspondents when creating Estate or Trust accounts.

    • revocableTrust

      public Optional<Boolean> revocableTrust()
      Indicates whether the trust is a revocable trust. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • taxId

      public Optional<String> taxId()
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related entity; Must be provided with `EIN` tax ID type

    • taxIdLastFour

      public Optional<String> taxIdLastFour()
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.

    • taxIdType

      public Optional<LegalEntityTaxIdType> taxIdType()
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

    • taxProfile

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<LegalEntityTaxProfile> taxProfile()
      The tax profile for the legal entity.

    • builder

      public static final LegalEntity.Builder builder()

    • withExemptCustomerReason

      public LegalEntity withExemptCustomerReason(LegalEntityExemptCustomerReason exemptCustomerReason)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Exempt entities must set `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` to `true` and provide an `exempt_customer_reason` on the owner record.

      Required if `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` is `true`.

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • withExemptCustomerReason

      public LegalEntity withExemptCustomerReason(Optional<? extends LegalEntityExemptCustomerReason> exemptCustomerReason)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Exempt entities must set `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` to `true` and provide an `exempt_customer_reason` on the owner record.

      Required if `exempt_verifying_beneficial_owners` is `true`.

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • withExemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners

      public LegalEntity withExemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners(boolean exemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners)
      Indicates whether the entity is exempt from verifying beneficial owners and Enhanced Due Diligence. By default, this is set to `false`

    • withExemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners

      public LegalEntity withExemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners(Optional<Boolean> exemptVerifyingBeneficialOwners)
      Indicates whether the entity is exempt from verifying beneficial owners and Enhanced Due Diligence. By default, this is set to `false`

      Indicates whether the entity is a foreign entity. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withForeignFinancialInstitution

      public LegalEntity withForeignFinancialInstitution(boolean foreignFinancialInstitution)
      Indicates whether the entity is a foreign financial institution. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withForeignFinancialInstitution

      public LegalEntity withForeignFinancialInstitution(Optional<Boolean> foreignFinancialInstitution)
      Indicates whether the entity is a foreign financial institution. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withFormationDate

      public LegalEntity withFormationDate(FormationDate formationDate)
      If the legal entity is a trust, the formation date is required.

    • withFormationDate

      public LegalEntity withFormationDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends FormationDate> formationDate)
      If the legal entity is a trust, the formation date is required.

      Globally Unique identifier for a legal natural person

    • withGlobalPersonId

      Globally Unique identifier for a legal natural person

      public LegalEntity withInstitutionalCustomer(boolean institutionalCustomer)
      Indicates whether the entity is an institutional customer

    • withInstitutionalCustomer

      public LegalEntity withInstitutionalCustomer(Optional<Boolean> institutionalCustomer)
      Indicates whether the entity is an institutional customer

    • withInvestigationId

      public LegalEntity withInvestigationId(String investigationId)
      Investigation id relating to the Customer Identification Program (CIP) and Customer Due Diligence (CDD).

    • withInvestigationId

      public LegalEntity withInvestigationId(Optional<String> investigationId)
      Investigation id relating to the Customer Identification Program (CIP) and Customer Due Diligence (CDD).

    • withLargeTrader

      public LegalEntity withLargeTrader(LegalEntityLargeTrader largeTrader)
      Large trader for the legal entity.

    • withLargeTrader

      public LegalEntity withLargeTrader(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends LegalEntityLargeTrader> largeTrader)
      Large trader for the legal entity.

    • withLegalAddress

      public LegalEntity withLegalAddress(LegalAddress legalAddress)
      The mailing address of the legal entity. Required fields within the `legal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • withLegalAddress

      public LegalEntity withLegalAddress(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends LegalAddress> legalAddress)
      The mailing address of the legal entity. Required fields within the `legal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • withLegalEntityId

      public LegalEntity withLegalEntityId(String legalEntityId)
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single juridical (non-natural) person (e.g., a corporation); Used to access the record after creation

    • withLegalEntityId

      public LegalEntity withLegalEntityId(Optional<String> legalEntityId)
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single juridical (non-natural) person (e.g., a corporation); Used to access the record after creation

    • withLeiCode

      public LegalEntity withLeiCode(String leiCode)
      The Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) is the financial industry term for a unique global identifier for legal entities participating in financial transactions

    • withLeiCode

      public LegalEntity withLeiCode(Optional<String> leiCode)
      The Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) is the financial industry term for a unique global identifier for legal entities participating in financial transactions

    • withName

      public LegalEntity withName(String name)
      The name field Format: legalEntities/{legalEntity}

    • withName

      public LegalEntity withName(Optional<String> name)
      The name field Format: legalEntities/{legalEntity}

    • withOperatingRegions

      public LegalEntity withOperatingRegions(List<String> operatingRegions)
      The operational footprint of an entity. Operating regions encompass all countries and regions where a company has a significant business presence This includes locations with physical offices, manufacturing plants, service centers, and sales and marketing activities Regions must be provided as two-character CLDR country codes

    • withOperatingRegions

      public LegalEntity withOperatingRegions(Optional<? extends List<String>> operatingRegions)
      The operational footprint of an entity. Operating regions encompass all countries and regions where a company has a significant business presence This includes locations with physical offices, manufacturing plants, service centers, and sales and marketing activities Regions must be provided as two-character CLDR country codes

    • withRegistrationRegion

      public LegalEntity withRegistrationRegion(String registrationRegion)
      The legal home of an entity. A region of registration, in the context of a corporation, refers to the specific geographic area where the corporation is legally registered and incorporated Defines the legal jurisdiction and framework under which the corporation operates, including legal regulations, tax obligations, and compliance requirements Region must be provided as a two-character CLDR country code

    • withRegistrationRegion

      public LegalEntity withRegistrationRegion(Optional<String> registrationRegion)
      The legal home of an entity. A region of registration, in the context of a corporation, refers to the specific geographic area where the corporation is legally registered and incorporated Defines the legal jurisdiction and framework under which the corporation operates, including legal regulations, tax obligations, and compliance requirements Region must be provided as a two-character CLDR country code

    • withRegulatedInvestmentCompany

      public LegalEntity withRegulatedInvestmentCompany(boolean regulatedInvestmentCompany)
      Indicates whether the entity is a regulated investment company. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withRegulatedInvestmentCompany

      public LegalEntity withRegulatedInvestmentCompany(Optional<Boolean> regulatedInvestmentCompany)
      Indicates whether the entity is a regulated investment company. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withRelatedDocumentIds

      public LegalEntity withRelatedDocumentIds(List<String> relatedDocumentIds)
      Document ids related to the legal entity. At least one is required for RIA correspondents when creating Estate or Trust accounts.

    • withRelatedDocumentIds

      public LegalEntity withRelatedDocumentIds(Optional<? extends List<String>> relatedDocumentIds)
      Document ids related to the legal entity. At least one is required for RIA correspondents when creating Estate or Trust accounts.

    • withRevocableTrust

      public LegalEntity withRevocableTrust(boolean revocableTrust)
      Indicates whether the trust is a revocable trust. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withRevocableTrust

      public LegalEntity withRevocableTrust(Optional<Boolean> revocableTrust)
      Indicates whether the trust is a revocable trust. By default, this is set to `false`.

    • withTaxId

      public LegalEntity withTaxId(String taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related entity; Must be provided with `EIN` tax ID type

    • withTaxId

      public LegalEntity withTaxId(Optional<String> taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related entity; Must be provided with `EIN` tax ID type

    • withTaxIdLastFour

      public LegalEntity withTaxIdLastFour(String taxIdLastFour)
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.

    • withTaxIdLastFour

      public LegalEntity withTaxIdLastFour(Optional<String> taxIdLastFour)
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.

    • withTaxIdType

      public LegalEntity withTaxIdType(LegalEntityTaxIdType taxIdType)
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

    • withTaxIdType

      public LegalEntity withTaxIdType(Optional<? extends LegalEntityTaxIdType> taxIdType)
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

    • withTaxProfile

      public LegalEntity withTaxProfile(LegalEntityTaxProfile taxProfile)
      The tax profile for the legal entity.

    • withTaxProfile

      public LegalEntity withTaxProfile(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends LegalEntityTaxProfile> taxProfile)
      The tax profile for the legal entity.
